The '''''Chaser''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] that was owned and operated by [[Baydo Chasdy]]. He utilized the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to transport stranded [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents out of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Dac]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-05-12 -->''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''
